- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements (E-commerce farmacia: productos, categorías, cuentas, órdenes, integración SIICAR stub)

- [x] Scaffold the Project (Next.js + TS + Tailwind + Prisma + NextAuth estructura creada)

- [x] Customize the Project (APIs básicas, páginas iniciales, contexto carrito, esquema Prisma, auth credenciales)

- [x] Install Required Extensions (N/A)

- [x] Compile the Project (Prisma migrate + build + tests OK; retirado experimental obsoleto)

- [x] Create and Run Task (Dev task creado; falla PowerShell ExecutionPolicy)

- [x] Launch the Project (Dev server en http://localhost:3000)

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete (README actualizado, checklist reflejado)
